_comment: CANONICAL CTA LEXICON (founder, changeover step 6). Battery check `cta-lexicon` enforces: every rendered button's visible text is canonical, sanctioned, or a fenced intents.json cta value. New entries require a founder ruling.

sanctioned.role: contact form submit — baseline-equity label (live contract)
partner funnel primary — founder ruling round 9 (partner-apply)
partner funnel secondary — founder ruling round 9 (partner-question)
nav-card / secondary label only — founder ruling round-12 audit; NOT a primary btn (canonical primary stays 'Book the discovery call')
find-an-accountant hub state-router button — founder ruling 2026-06-17 (state selector routes to the chosen state's page)

sanctioned.text: Talk to a Certified ProAdvisor (independent firm)
sanctioned.role: support-silo phone CTA — MANDATED by v4 Sheet-7 page rule 4 (honest-triage: never 'QuickBooks support line'; the label itself states the independent-firm boundary)
tools/calculators result → fixed-fee quote conversion (round 83 NEW type — RATIFIED by founder round 84)
tools/calculators → /pricing/ catalog nav, parallels 'Explore Services' (round 83 NEW type — RATIFIED by founder round 84)
tools/calculators in-page anchor to the live tool, parallels 'The Four Trust Pillars' (round 83 NEW type — RATIFIED by founder round 84)
/tools/ hub → live tool navigation (round 83 NEW type — RATIFIED by founder round 84)
new-design header CTA (handoff Elevation chrome) — phone primary
new-design drawer call CTA (handoff Elevation chrome) — real toll-free
phone-number call button (handoff Money/call-block design) — real toll-free

_machinery_note: intents.json per-intent `cta` values swap the form submit label at runtime — fenced machinery, treated as sanctioned by the battery check.
